scenario.name: GRUU INVITE Lookup
scenario.send: INVITE sip:lookup@ims.local;gr=urn:uuid:3333-4444 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller@ims.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:lookup@ims.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:lookup@ims.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller@ims.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:lookup@ims.local>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Content-Length: 0
